13.Print the multiplication table of 5 using a while loop.

package testassi4;

public class Multiplication {

	public static void main(String[] args) {
		// TODO Auto-generated method stub
		int a=5;
		while(a<=100) {
			System.out.println(a);
			a+=5;
		}

	}

}


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

14.Print numbers from 1 to 100 using a for loop.

package testassi4;

public class Forloop {

	public static void main(String[] args) {
		// TODO Auto-generated method stub
		for(int a=1;a<=100;a++)
		{
			System.out.println(a);
		}

	}

}


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

15.Print even numbers from 2 to 50.

package testassi4;

public class EvenNumbers {

	public static void main(String[] args) {
		// TODO Auto-generated method stub
		for(int a=1;a<=50;a++) {
			if(a%2==0) {
				System.out.println(a);
			}
		}

	}

}


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

16.print odd numbers from 1 to 50.

package testassi4;

public class Oddno {

	public static void main(String[] args) {
		// TODO Auto-generated method stub
		for(int a=1;a<=50;a++)
		{
			if(a%2==1) {
				System.out.println(a);
			}
		}
	}

}


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

17.Print the multiplication table of 9.

package testassi4;

public class Multiplicationtable {

	public static void main(String[] args) {
		// TODO Auto-generated method stub
		int a=1;
		while(a<=100) {
			if(a%9==0)
			{
				System.out.println(a);
			}
			a++;
		}

	}

}


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
